requirement_topic.en: Industrial Lithium Cell and Battery Safety — IEC 62619 / ST RK / GOST Adoption
requirement_topic.zh: 工业锂电芯和电池安全——IEC 62619 / ST RK / GOST采用
requirement_topic.zht: 工業鋰電芯和電池安全——IEC 62619 / ST RK / GOST採用

summary.en: Kazakhstan projects may request industrial lithium cell and battery safety evidence based on IEC 62619 or its ST RK / GOST adoption, especially for stationary storage batteries used in BESS racks and containers. This evidence is usually reviewed together with the EAC file, project specifications, insurer requirements, and owner acceptance tests.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦项目可能要求基于IEC 62619或其ST RK / GOST采用版本的工业锂电芯和电池安全证据，特别是用于BESS电池架和集装箱的固定式储能电池。该证据通常与EAC文件、项目技术规格、保险方要求和业主验收测试一并审查。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦項目可能要求基於IEC 62619或其ST RK / GOST採用版本的工業鋰電芯和電池安全證據，特別是用於BESS電池架和集裝箱的固定式儲能電池。該證據通常與EAC文件、項目技術規格、保險方要求和業主驗收測試一併審查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes; safety requirements for industrial lithium batteries
Applicable ST RK / GOST adoption of IEC 62619 where specified by the Kazakhstan project

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024 for compulsory safety of lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage and GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electric energy storage. These can support technical comparison but may not be accepted as the same standard as IEC 62619 or the Kazakhstan-adopted ST RK / GOST version.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024作为电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池强制性安全要求，并依据GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能用锂离子电池技术标准。这些证据可支持技术比对，但未必等同于IEC 62619或哈萨克斯坦采用的ST RK / GOST版本。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024作為電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池強制性安全要求，並依據GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能用鋰離子電池技術標準。這些證據可支持技術比對，但未必等同於IEC 62619或哈薩克斯坦採用的ST RK / GOST版本。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare a clause-by-clause comparison between GB 44240 / GB/T 36276 and IEC 62619 or the required ST RK / GOST text, identify test differences for abuse, overcharge, thermal, short-circuit, BMS protection, and enclosure assumptions, and retest or supplement evidence where the Kazakhstan project owner or conformity body requires the IEC-based route.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备GB 44240 / GB/T 36276与IEC 62619或所需ST RK / GOST文本的逐条对照，识别滥用、过充、热、短路、BMS保护和外壳假设等测试差异，并在哈萨克斯坦项目业主或合格评定机构要求IEC路径时补充测试或证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備GB 44240 / GB/T 36276與IEC 62619或所需ST RK / GOST文本的逐條對照，識別濫用、過充、熱、短路、BMS保護和外殼假設等測試差異，並在哈薩克斯坦項目業主或合格評定機構要求IEC路徑時補充測試或證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific or conformity-file requirement where IEC 62619 or ST RK / GOST adoption is specified; may be required by owner, insurer, or conformity body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024 where in scope; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 44240 and GB/T 36276 evidence should be mapped to IEC 62619 or the specified ST RK / GOST adoption. Kazakhstan stakeholders may request IEC-based retesting or supplemental evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 44240和GB/T 36276证据应映射至IEC 62619或指定ST RK / GOST采用版本。哈萨克斯坦相关方可能要求按IEC路径补测或补充证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 44240和GB/T 36276證據應映射至IEC 62619或指定ST RK / GOST採用版本。哈薩克斯坦相關方可能要求按IEC路徑補測或補充證據。
